meta.description: Kiwi's persistent memory for Claude Code. Always read this at session start. Always append to memory_log when decisions are made.

profile.name: Kiwi

goals.passive_income_notes: Staking + savings ~£160-220/mo currently. Real play is token allocations from BD deals and Cheese merch rev share. Negotiate 5-10% cut of merch revenue before launch.

founderfi.name: FOUNDERFi LABZ
founderfi.mint_location: TBA — don't trust links from anywhere else
founderfi.mechanic: Term Sheet NFT ($10) = tradeable GTD seat. Burn on mint day + $40 = Genesis NFT. Don't redeem = forfeit, rolls to public.

roadmap.S1: Genesis + Ship or Rug (idle startup sim, multipliers for holders)
roadmap.S4: TBA (sara hasn't approved the rest yet)

game_ship_or_rug.description: Idle startup sim. Build a crypto company, hire team, manage resources, ship features, earn $FOUNDER tokens, exit via Buyout or IPO.
game_ship_or_rug.feedback_tool: Built two-part feedback form for alpha/beta testing

collab_manager_deal.model: Hybrid — 1 NFT (from team supply) per confirmed collab + % cash commission per attributed mint
collab_manager_deal.confirmed_collab_definition: TBD — Space, joint post, or allowlist swap

community_manager.notes: DM drafted — emphasize Genesis collection as foundation, holder benefits, existing product (Ship or Rug + FOUNDERFi BUILD beta)

kiwi_compensation.structure: Monthly retainer + % of mint proceeds + secondary royalties
kiwi_compensation.notes: Stable base + equity upside. Room to negotiate down from opening.

tools_built: FOUNDERFi_Content_Comms.xlsx (content calendar + post bank + WL swap tracker)

kura.name: Kura (Abstract Ecosystem)
achievements: Built KOL relationships across Abstract network
Developed alternative monetization frameworks (user fees, sponsor models)

weekly_rhythm.monday: Opinion post — market, culture, something noticed
weekly_rhythm.tuesday: Project post — Rebels, Franky, or W3P. Art + angle
weekly_rhythm.wednesday: Replies only — 15 mins replying to builders you want to connect with. No posting.
weekly_rhythm.thursday: Project post — different project than Tuesday
weekly_rhythm.friday: Personal/humor — dog content, self-deprecating crypto joke

content_strategy.example_post: Sloppy keeps cooking. Cheese might be my favorite character design this year. @web3playboys
voice_guardrails: Honest about the bear market grind
No post without a point of view
content_strategy.pro_tip: Batch write Sunday night or Monday morning. Draft all 4, schedule or drop through the week.

network.approach: Rolodex built on trust, not transactional DMs

upside_plays: Token allocations from BD deals (0.5-2% in early projects)
Referral/intro fees (5-10% finder's fee standard in Web3)

tools_and_infrastructure.dashboard_issues: Too many features, doesn't reflect posting rhythm, easy to forget. Needs: content queue tied to weekly rhythm, project status at a glance, one morning prompt.
spreadsheets_built: FOUNDERFi_Content_Comms.xlsx — content calendar May→Jul 7 + post bank + WL swap tracker

calendly.use_case: BD calls, partnership convos, team coordination

memory_log.note: Kiwi confirmed as Lead Ops. July 7 mint date on Ethereum. Reviewed FOUNDERFi Genesis mint brief. Term sheet mechanic ($10 presale → $50 total). Working on collab manager commission structure and community manager hire.
Tweet drafts finalized: '1,111 founders. One shot.' + 'Being a crypto founder looks easy from the outside.' — Option 5 (ship or rug angle) selected as strongest.
Cheese character rotation v01 complete (Sloppy, 06/01/26). 5-angle rotation sheet done. Merch in dev — box/plush fit issue (plush 0.5cm too tall). Dieline requested from vendor.

Calculated income viability. Monthly expenses ~£900-1,400 essentials + mortgage TBD. Passive income currently ~£160-220/mo (staking/savings). Real moves: token allocations, merch rev share, WL flipping, intro fees.
Bought 2 BAYC Mutant Apes. Bear market conviction buy. Post drafted — nostalgia angle (vintage Star Wars figures / collector instinct).
Weekly Special Space. re:generates collab. Pun: 're:served'. Tweet approved: Franky's Adventures tournament, re:generates NFT prize.

Reviewed kiwistation.github.io dashboard. Issue: too many features, not useful enough daily. Recommendation: strip to 3 things — post type for today, project status, post idea bank. Set as browser homepage.
Cheese plush: L11×W10×H15.5cm. Box: H15×W11×D13cm. Plush 0.5cm too tall. Options: 16cm box, compress (risky), reduce plush to 14.5cm.
Distribution model built. Collab model: 1 NFT per collab secured + % per attributed mint. Spreadsheet built with 20 collab rows + 16 team rows.
Built beta feedback form for Ship or Rug game. Two-part form: first-run experience + multi-run depth. Terminal aesthetic. Fixed two bugs in form submission logic.
T-shirt vendor research. Bella+Canvas 3413 triblend selected as blank. Shortlist: Extreme Screen Prints, Scrappy Apparel, Streetwear House. 1,000 unit run. Comfort Colors 1717 eliminated (too heavy).
